visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair stands in the middle of a brightly lit shopping mall atrium. She wears a white, blue, and purple color-block knit sweater with fringe details and a black skirt. She gestures enthusiastically with her hands while speaking directly to the camera. Behind her, a blurred background shows mall levels, escalators, and passers-by. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a promotional stand for 'OASIS 馬琳糖專賣店'. The sign is yellow and white, listing various promotional offers like '5 bags for $1000' and a giveaway for following their IG. The lighting remains bright and even, typical of a retail environment. (3) A close-up shot features a single meringue cookie—a white, peaked dollop of sugar topped with strawberry bits—resting on a small, round biscuit held by a hand with gray-blue nail polish. The texture of the meringue looks crisp and delicate against the golden-brown biscuit. (4) Back to the woman, she now holds a large clear plastic bag filled with assorted meringue biscuits. She pulls one out and holds it close to the lens to show its detail before taking a bite. The background shows the interior of the mall's lower level with warm artificial lighting. (5) A montage of close-up shots displays different product bags with labels like 'Matcha', 'Lemon', 'Oreo', and 'Caramel'. Each bag is filled with small, colorful treats. The camera pans across bins filled with various flavors, showing a wide selection of shapes and toppings. (6) The woman stands behind the counter of the pop-up stall, which is a white kiosk decorated with small plants and product displays. She continues to hold two large bags of treats, pointing at them with a smile. Large bold text '抽兩位 送六包!' appears at the bottom of the frame in yellow and white.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我最近來看我們的. [Variety]: 快閃店的時候. [Subtitle]: 發現了一個. [Variety]: 超刷嘴的隱藏零食. (2) [Subtitle]: 就是現在在桃園台茂快閃的. [Logo]: OASIS 馬琳糖專賣店. [Slogan]: 快閃特惠. (3) [Subtitle]: 它是低油、減糖的. [Variety]: 蛋白糖霜餅乾. (4) [Subtitle]: 很像在吃脆口的棉花糖又不會太負擔. (5) [Subtitle]: 有多種口味可以選擇. [Variety]: 抹茶、檸檬、OREO、焦糖脆脆等. (6) [Subtitle]: 現場都可以試吃超多種任你挑選不怕你吃. (7) [Variety]: 而且都很大包耶. (8) [Subtitle]: 不過這個在辦公室一下就沒了要多買幾包. (9) [Variety]: 我個人最喜歡的是. [Subtitle]: 草莓脆脆. (10) [Variety]: 很刷嘴內一口接一口. (11) [Subtitle]: 過年不要都吃一樣的糖果餅乾了一定要買這個當零嘴. (12) [Subtitle]: 聽完之後是不是流口水很想吃啊你下面留言說你想吃什麼我們就. [Variety]: 抽兩位送六包!. (13) [Subtitle]: 1/3到2/10 OASIS馬琳糖會在桃園台茂B2有快閃店也可以到他們官網逛逛喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 4 blurred female passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long black hair, wearing a white, blue, and purple color-block knit sweater with fringe details and a black midi skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern shopping mall interior featuring an open atrium, escalators, retail shopfronts, and a dedicated pop-up stall for 'OASIS' meringue cookies with signage and display bins.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks in Traditional Chinese with a friendly and enthusiastic tone. The pitch is moderate but varies frequently to maintain engagement. An upbeat, acoustic pop background track features a bright acoustic guitar rhythm and light piano melodies at a tempo of approximately 120 BPM. (2) As the speaker transitions to describing the product, a distinct 'pop' sound effect accompanies the appearance of a text overlay. The voice becomes more descriptive, lowering slightly in pitch while maintaining a fast speech rate. The background mall ambience is very quiet, suggesting high-quality audio recording. (3) The vocal intensity increases as she lists different flavors. Each flavor name is pronounced clearly with high articulation. The music remains steady in the background, providing a cheerful bed for the narration. Short, percussive sound effects like 'dings' punctuate the listing of promotional prices and dates. (4) During the final call to action, the voice rises in arousal and volume, sounding very inviting. The BGM swells slightly in volume toward the end. The track ends with a clean fade-out of the music following the speaker's final promotional message and request for user engagement.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Feature Highlights -> Personal Recommendation -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a pop-up store for 'OASIS Meringue' at the Taimall (TaiMall) shopping center in Taoyuan. The video highlights product features such as low oil and sugar content, a wide variety of flavors, and current promotional deals to drive physical visits and social media participation via a giveaway.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically visits a branded stall, describes product benefits in detail, shows promotional signs with pricing, and holds a giveaway linked to the brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly effective social-media style promotional video that uses a fast-paced edit, vibrant colors, and an engaging host to market a local food pop-up.
